transcript.text:
(Handmade noodles in 2023...?)
(A Chinese restaurant with 70 years of history)
(And the one person who's about to go down)
(in the history of this place)
(is here today) You really eat so well!
(Last name Hungry, first name Always...)
I wish you were my daughter in law
(I can pay for your food expenses hon)
(I'll take care of it...) You just have to make more money! That's it!
(With all due respect, I belong to my fans...!)
(Click...)
(Click x2...)
(And even a beverage gift!) Thank you
(As usual...) Wait, I have to know
(She's received as much love as the amount she eats) Where did it all go?
(A neighborhood full of tall buildings...)

Hello, everyone
So today,
(Tzuyang is out to get some jjajangmyeon*) I'm here for Chinese food *Black bean sauce noodles
and this restaurant has been in business for 70 years
They said they opened this place in 1953
So it's their 70th year this year
And they're known to have a lot of regulars
and quite famous in this neighborhood
(There's more!) And this place
(Rare kind) serves only handmade noodles,
even the dumplings are all handmade here
There aren't many places left like this one
(Full of expectations...!) so it's been ages since I had handmade noodles!
(Full of expectations...!) That's what really makes me excited today
(Dabo Building in Mapo-gu)
(Located on the first base floor of the building)

(It's 'Hyun Rae Jang')
(Enters) Nice to meet you
(She's fascinated to see Tzuyang LOLOL) It's an honor to have you here, really
I didn't know you were that famous!
(Nah, I'm just a humble...big-eater) No, please
So it's been 17 years since we moved here!
(Moving is just another part of history) With that period included, it's been 70 years?
(Moving is just another part of history) Yeap
I looked up your channel and
(You really are famous...!) you had millions of subscribers...!
- So it's really an honor to have you here - No, the honor is mine, ma'am
(Photo time) Can we take a photo together?
(Photo time) Of course!
Come out front, I need you to cover my belly lol
Mom...your face looks really big now...lol
(Why you little...) I'll go just a little bit back then

(Just kidding mom, lol)
(Found the menu) The menu!
Oh, there are so many to choose from!
(Got a lot of options to choose from) Jjajangmyeon* is a must and Chinese style cold noodles, *Black bean sauce noodles
and definitely sweet and sour pork
I think I should ask for recommendations
Ma'am!
What's the most popular dish in the cuisine section?
The seafood kinds are okay
Do you like shrimp?
Yes, I love shrimp
(Got chili/Kung Pao/cream flavors) Shrimp sounds good
(It's so hard) What should I eat though...
(After having a long discussion with the owner...)
(and with the producer as well...she chose to go with...)
(Done deciding) Then I'll have

old school jjajangmyeon, uni-jjajangmyeon
Chinese-style cold noodles, small-sized sweet and sour pork
medium size Kung Pao shrimp, stir-fried seafood with abalone and scallop, and handmade fried dumplings
(That's a lot) I can't memorize them all...
(The help is on the way!)
(old school & uni-jjajangmyeon, Chinese-style cold noodles, sweet & sour pork Kung Pao shrimp, stir-fried seafood, handmade fried dumplings)
(Done ordering 7 menus in total!)
(And the kitchen gets hectic...)
(That's for one customer) This is all for 1 person?
(That's for one customer) Yeap
(70 years of history and still is in the making...)
(With the skills from the chef, you get...)
(The handmade noodles!!)
(And fancy cooking method with wok is a must for Chinese food)
(Old school & uni-jjajangmyeon)
(Kung Pao shrimp)

(Sweet and sour pork)
(Forget about the mediocre dumplings...)
(It's the handmade fried dumplings)
(Stir-fried seafood with abalone and scallop)
(Chinese-style cold noodles)
(And they're all about to be served now...!!)
(A cart full of dishes...)
(The food will enter now)
- That's Kung Pao shrimp - Be careful now
Thank you
(My goodness)
Whoa, the amount is so generous here...!!
(And the last one, uni-jjajangmyeon...)
(Your food is here) Thank you
I'll first go ahead and get the sauce in
(The glossy sauce makes it look so appetizing...!)

Whoa, the amount is so generous here!
(All set!) Looks delicious!
And for the pork, I'll only pour half of the sauce
(A way to satisfy both the dippers and pourers...?)
(Nvm, she just poured all of it)
Thanks for the food!
Starting with old school jjajangmyeon!
It's got a huge chunk of potato in it
(And the sauce looks lighter than the other one) And the sauce looks completely different!
(No need to mention it) The noodles are really handmade too!
Now that's a proper old school dish!
I think this place serves twice more portion
(Even the amount of food is great...!) It's got heaps of noodles
I should try this potato first
This really is old school!
(Cares a lot about her chopsticks)

I should try this one first
(A special chopstick move)
The noodles are really bouncy
And the sauce! It's totally old school!
If you see here,
the uneven thickness of the noodles tells you that it's handmade
And it's really bouncy....!
(Deliciously chewy...) Chewy and delicious
The flavor isn't that overwhelming
(Conclusion : It's legit) It really has that nostalgic taste from the past
Sweet and sour pork!
This is really great! It's like...
It's got that crunchiness of chips...
(Gotta eat it first)
The sauce is really great too...!
(It's got just the right proportion of flavors) It's not that sour, it's a bit sweet and super savory...!

And these were made this morning!
(We need this soy sauce for sure!)
(+ a bit of chili powder)
And here we go
Every food here has this bouncy texture
It's really crispy on the outside
(Didn't expect this texture!) But inside, it's really chewy like glutinous rice!
(Amazingly good)
Now to Kung Pao shrimp!
This is quite the amount...!
The shrimp inside is so big! See this?!
Mmm!! This is great!
(The one she hasn't really tried before!) I'll try the stir-fried seafood now
That's a mini-sized abalone
(And another piece of shrimp!) The shrimp is really huge!
(First time trying it) So that's what this dish tasted like

(It's a gourmet food with a lot of seafood) It's got shrimp, scallops, abalone...and even sea cucumbers!
It's really got that authentic Chinese dish vibe!
(Time for some cold noodles!) Now, let's try this one!
(One of her favorite dishes) I'm a big fan of these Chinese-style cold noodles
But I don't see peanut butter sauce...!
Oh, there is?
(I'm right here...)
(The beacon does not shine on its own base, right...? lol) Oh, this is the peanut butter sauce? Really?
(It's okay! That happens...!) So this is it, I thought it was vinegar and mustard
It's really similar to Korean-style cold noodles without this
And...
(What's going on now)
(Someone's approaching Tzuyang...?)
(A fan gave her some beverages after recognizing her) My gosh, thank you, I'll enjoy this
I really appreciate it...!
(It's the fans who always make my day) My gosh, I got free plum juice

(Browsing...)
(Thanks again!!)
Let's get heaps of peanut butter sauce!
The more the better
(Not enough) I need more
It's so good X4
That's what I'm talking about!
Chinese-style cold noodles are a must for summer days!
(I wonder what this is) Is this the skin of blowfish?
I think it's a sea cucumber!
(+ another piece of knowledge) Oh, that's a sea cucumber
(Even more...?) I need more peanut butter sauce!
(That's more like peanut butter noodles...)
(This is it) This is it, it's got just the right amount now!
I think I tried pork like this before!
It's kinda similar to other restaurants but

the crispy layer outside
(Just like snacks...!) it really tastes like you're eating some chips
It's so good
(Finishing up the old school jjajangmyeon)
The sauce is really glutinous!
(Cleared the old school jjajangmyeon!)
(Getting friendlier with seafood this time)
There's this cold jellyfish salad in here
(Loving it) And it's really good
(A 27-year-old with sensitive teeth...) Ugh, my teeth...
(It's delicious but my teeth hurt...)
(So tingly)
(She just chose to enjoy the pain as well...lol)
(Better take care of your health, everyone!) How come I already got sensitive teeth?
The crispy layer is thin and it's got a huge chunk of meat inside
(Thin layer of batter, and a big chunk of meat...!)

(And she just kept digging in...)
It's literally packed with shrimp on the inside!
It's just full of it!
(A whole shrimp inside the crispy layer)
I'm so jealous right now
If we eat that much, we gain weight right away
(The critical downside) But it costs too much
I still prefer not gaining weight though
People like me just gain weight straight away
(And some of her fans started to recognize her...!) Just go ask her!
(Another photo time!) Hello
(Amazed to see the amount of food in person...) You really ate a lot...
That's amazing...!!!
(We're just glad that you enjoy our show...!) Thank you
My son wants me to get a picture with you
(3, 2, 1...!)

(And that's a wrap for the brief, jolly photo time...!)
It's way above the league than the usual ones
It's different from the ones that are soaked with grease
The skin is slightly thicker
but I think it's made of glutinous rice, it's so bouncy
(Uncomparable to mediocre dumplings!!) It's so much better than the ones you get from other places
Dumpling is a must-try dish here
(And the chef came out of the kitchen to get a picture!)
(1, 2, 3... and click!)
You should make it tastier for her next time!
(But it's already great though...!) Thank you
He never asked another celebrity for a picture
no matter how famous they were
(Feeling shy)
I wish you were my daughter in law
And you were born in 1997?

Yes! That's right
My son was also born in the year of the ox
in 1985...
(LOLOLOLOL)
And the food expense really must be high for you!
It sure is...
(Far beyond...) It's beyond your imagination
But you can always earn more money!!
The dumpling is seriously good here
And honestly...
Everything is really great
but this seafood dish...
(Finds the dish pretty awkward) I ordered it without knowing what it is
(because it's her first time) There's this similar dish that I can't really eat well
I can tell it sure is a delicious one, but I'm not really used to the flavors
(My bad...) I don't think it's my type of dish actually

Sure is for me
(The producer really wants it bad LOLOLOL)
You can have it
(Scooping up the seafood...)
(Just gimme the whole plate!) I should've just taken the whole plate
Heh, and that's it...!
The rest is for me
And finally, it's uni-jjajangmyeon!)
(Looks so delicious and appetizing...!) Whoa! This looks delicious!
So this one is called Uni Jjajangmyeon in Korean
I thought it'd be full of minced meat
(A variety of seafood) But rather than meat
(It's what makes this place different!) it's got seafood in it instead
It even tastes like the stir-fried jjajangmyeon!!
The sauce is even richer
It's totally different from the old school one

Personally...
(Uni Jjajangmyeon wins!) I prefer this one more
(She's still enjoying the food...!)
(Found the cup) We have an ice cup over here!
(And her favorite drink...!) It's been so long since I had this! Thanks a lot again
(Bottoms up!!)
(Spilled all over)
(Why do you keep wearing white clothes when you always spill sauce on it...?)
It's now become a habit of my own now
(Trying to get rid of it...) And it's not going away
It's still there
(So cool) Whatever!
(The master of balance...each plate has a bite left...)
I finished the noodles!
(Cleared the pork!)
(Cleared Kung Pao Shrimp too!)

(And the rest of the stir-fried seafood...!)
Saved the best for the last!
It's so good even when it's cold...!
(Done eating at 'Hyun Rae Jang' with 70 yrs of history!)
You really eat so well...
The true big eater!
But what happened here...?
(Trying to clean it herself! She's so kind!) It's okay, it won't go away now...
(Thanks so much for the care!) I was going to do it myself but...Thank you!
It looks like you two are having a quarrel right now
(You gon be my daughter-in-law or what?) He said it looks like we're having a quarrel
- I really enjoyed the food - Thank you
(We will) Please come visit us again!
(come back again for sure!) Of course, I will
And that was another great meal today!
(Even after the filming was done)

(there were several more photo sessions...!)
(And that's how Tzuyang spent another great day)
